Class ValidationVisitor

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.visitors.AllNodeVisitor
io.apicurio.datamodels.visitors.CompositeAllNodeVisitor
io.apicurio.datamodels.validation.ValidationVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
AsyncApi20Visitor, AsyncApi21Visitor, AsyncApi22Visitor, AsyncApi23Visitor, AsyncApi24Visitor, AsyncApi25Visitor, AsyncApi26Visitor, AsyncApi2xVisitor, AsyncApi30Visitor, AsyncApi31Visitor, AsyncApi3xVisitor, AsyncApiVisitor, JSDraft4Visitor, JSDraft6Visitor, JSDraft7Visitor, JSDraftVisitor, JS201909Visitor, JS202012Visitor, JSModernVisitor, JsonSchemaVisitor, OpenApi20Visitor, OpenApi30Visitor, OpenApi31Visitor, OpenApi32Visitor, OpenApi3xVisitor, OpenApiVisitor, OpenRpc13Visitor, OpenRpc14Visitor, OpenRpc1xVisitor, CombinedVisitor, TraversingVisitor, Visitor, IValidationProblemReporter
public class ValidationVisitor extends CompositeAllNodeVisitor implements IValidationProblemReporter, TraversingVisitor
Base class for all validation visitors.
